case_title: INSTITUTE OF CHILD LANGUAGE VS RAMADA INN SF.INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREG COCHRAN DIR.CATERING RAMADA INN SF INT AIRPT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY INSTITUTE OF CHILD LANGUAGE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMADA INN SF.INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT GREG COCHRAN DIR.CATERING RAMADA INN SF INT AIRPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-1995 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INSTITUTE OF CHILD LANGUAGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAMADA INN SF.INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT DEFT COCHRAN DISMISSED.
